description: case-insensitive keyword/regex search over the LanceDB corpus the retriever already built (read-only)
rules: read-only: scans the existing LanceDB table, never re-extracts source documents and never mutates the index
pattern is a Python regex, matched case-insensitive across every indexed chunk (text/table/chart/image transcriptions)
results are capped (default --max-hits 50) and written under record_store
usage: Set QUERY (the regex/keyword) and LANCEDB_URI (the dir holding the index built by `retriever ingest`). Output: grep_corpus.txt (one `<pdf>:p<page>:<type>:  ...snippet...` line per hit, or NO_MATCH).
limitation: Requires an index already built by the NeMo Retriever library (`retriever ingest`) and the retriever venv (lancedb + pandas) on PATH. Search-only over the indexed corpus — does not ingest, embed, re-rank, or run semantic vector query; that is the external `retriever` CLI which needs the NeMo Retriever install (and, for many input shapes, libreoffice/ffmpeg and optionally a NIM endpoint).
